name: TC-17: Add Product Rejects Duplicate SKU
description: Adding a product with an already existing SKU displays a validation error.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the login page at /login
Type admin@suryaelektrik.com in the email input field
Type password123 in the password input field
Click the Masuk ke Sistem button
Click the Master Produk sidebar navigation item
Click the TAMBAH PRODUK button to open the form modal
Type LMP-LED-10W-PH in the SKU input field
Type Duplicate Product Test in the Nama input field
Type pcs in the Satuan input field
Type 45000 in the Harga input field
Type 10 in the Batas Minimal Stok input field
Click the Simpan Produk button to submit the form
Verify that an error message indicating that the SKU is already in use is displayed
Verify the modal remains open so the user can correct the SKU
